causalAutopsy.notes: detectContextExhaustion has matched the bare phrase 'conversation too long' anywhere in the tmux pane since it was written — no guard separating a real CLI error from the phrase as content. Latent until a session whose work centered on that exact phrase (RUN-2 2026-06-06, topic 13435, an autonomous session building conversation-too-long features) filled its own pane with it, and the recovery notice the detector emits re-entered the pane, self-amplifying into a ~27-message flood on a healthy session. Needed a session that both discusses the phrase heavily and runs long enough to accumulate it — why it surfaced now, not at ship time.
